expectedDifferences.reason: The local proxy creates a deterministic synthetic MarketWebPresence id while the capture stores Shopify's disposable live id.

notes: Live Admin GraphQL 2026-04 capture proves a cold local replay of the first staged subfolder webPresenceCreate derives rootUrls from cassette-backed shop domain hydration instead of a fabricated local hostname. The same fixture's upstreamCalls record the exact MarketsMutationPreflightHydrate query the runtime sends before staging the mutation.
